reason: The published JAR for org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-starter-logging:2.6.3 contains only META-INF files and no JVM class files; it declares logging dependencies rather than providing runtime classes.
replacement: Use the class-bearing dependencies declared by the starter, such as ch.qos.logback:logback-classic:1.2.10, org.apache.logging.log4j:log4j-to-slf4j:2.17.1, and org.slf4j:jul-to-slf4j:1.7.33.
